languages.text: "Я вижу тебя, сын Империума. Да будет тебе дарована Милость Императора".
"I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."
languages.original_text: "Я вижу тебя, сын Империума. Да будет тебе дарована Милость Императора".

traits.locale_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Peace."
"I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Peace."
"I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Peace."

languages.text: «Te veo, hijo del Imperium. Que la misericordia del Emperador sea contigo».
languages.original_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."

traits.locale_text: «Te veo, hijo del Imperium. Que la misericordia del Emperador sea contigo».

languages.text: “我看见你了，帝国之子。愿你得享帝皇的慈悲。”
languages.original_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."

traits.locale_text: “我看见你了，帝国之子。愿你得享帝皇的慈悲。”

languages.text: « Je vous vois, fils de l'Imperium. Que la miséricorde de l'Empereur vous soit accordée. »
languages.original_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous vois, fils de l'Imperium. Que la miséricorde de l'Empereur vous soit accordée. »

languages.text: "Seni görüyorum İmparatorluk'un evladı. İmparator'un Merhameti sana bahşedilsin."
languages.original_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."

traits.locale_text: "Seni görüyorum İmparatorluk'un evladı. İmparator'un Merhameti sana bahşedilsin."

languages.text: "Ich sehe Euch, Sohn des Imperiums. Möget Ihr die Gnade des Imperators erlangen."
languages.original_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe Euch, Sohn des Imperiums. Möget Ihr die Gnade des Imperators erlangen."

languages.text: 「見ているぞ、帝国の息子よ。汝に皇帝の安息が与えられんことを」
languages.original_text: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Peace."

traits.locale_text: 「見ているぞ、帝国の息子よ。汝に皇帝の安息が与えられんことを」
